column8: I hope I (get) a doll on Christmas, but my brother said he (get) a new camera.
column9: – Do you think it (rain) tomorrow? – I hope not.
column10: Nelly promised she (send) a card from Florida.
column11: I am sure we (have) a thunderstorm tonight.
column12: I (go) to the post-office for you?
column13: I had no idea when they (come).
column14: We said we (not watch) TV all day long.
column15: I doubted if they (make) it up.
